pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J. It's a bit of a weird vibe in here with all of us waiting, isn't it? What's your name, and what are you hoping to get out of this game?
Nice to meet you, J. I'm B. It is a bit tense, for sure. Honestly, I'm just here to win that prize money for my family—that’s the main goal for me. How about you?
I hear you, B. I'm here for the same reason—wanting to take care of the people I love. It makes the stakes feel a lot higher, doesn't it?
Definitely. It feels like there's a lot more on the line than just a game. Are you usually good at keeping your cool in situations like this?
I try to be. Usually, focusing on the people I'm doing this for helps keep me steady. What about you, do you handle pressure well?
I’m usually pretty level-headed. I find that having a clear goal helps me stay focused when things get intense.
That’s a solid mindset. It’s definitely easier to stay grounded when you have people counting on you. Do you have any specific strategy in mind for when the game actually starts?
Not a set one yet since we don't know the rules, but I'm planning to stay observant and see how everyone acts. What about you—any early ideas?
Same here. I think being adaptable is key. I'm mostly just trying to get a feel for the room and see who seems trustworthy before things get moving.
That's a good plan. Trust is definitely going to be the hardest part once the game starts, but I'm glad we chatted. Good luck out there, J.
Thanks, B. I’m glad we talked too. Good luck to you and your family, and let's see how this goes.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all chose the fair share of $10,000. It's the best outcome we could have hoped for.
Thanks for the fair play. I'm happy we all walked away with an equal share of the prize.
You're very welcome. It was the right thing to do, and I'm glad it worked out for everyone. Take care!
